title: lobelia nummularia
intro: Lobelia nummularia, also known as Chinese lobelia, is a plant species in the Lobeliaceae family, native to China and known for its medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties, which help to relieve congestion and coughs. The plant is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, providing relief from muscle spasms and pain. Lobelia nummularia is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall health and well-being.
